accent.description: Rose 700 - Alerts, Red Flags, Critical Actions

usage_rules: Use Primary (Deep Teal) for main actions and active states.
Use Accent (Rose) ONLY for critical alerts, 'Red Flags', or destructive actions.
Use Secondary (Pale Teal) for active card backgrounds or selected states.
Backgrounds must be pure white (#FFFFFF) or very light gray (#F8FAFC) for maximum contrast.
Text must never be pure black. Use Slate 900 (#0F172A) for headings and Slate 600 (#475569) for body.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.default: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/80
badges.secondary: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80
badges.destructive: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/80

images.description: Professional doctor portrait for dashboard profile
Abstract scientific/medical background for login page
Clean clinic interior for empty states or generic placeholders

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px, consistent size (w-4 h-4 for small, w-5 h-5 for default)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text. Use Slate-600 or darker on white.
accessibility.aria: Use aria-labels for icon-only buttons. Ensure form inputs have associated labels.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use grids and asymmetry.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
Do not use 'Inter' for headings; use 'Manrope'.
Avoid full-screen gradients; use subtle textures or solid colors.
instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the custom colors and font families.
3. Create a 'Layout' component that wraps pages with the standard header/sidebar.
4. Build the 'New Patient Case' form using Shadcn Form components, but styled with the 'Manrope' font and generous spacing.
5. Ensure the 'AI Clinical Output' section uses distinct visual hierarchy (e.g., Red border for Red Flags, Green/Teal for Next Steps).
6. Use the provided image URLs for the doctor profile and login background.
